title: Adoration des bergers

illustrations.caption: Gaetano Zumbo, Adoration des bergers, Londres Victoria and Albert Museum, inv. A.3-1935 (https://collections.vam.ac.uk/item/O96667/the-adoration-of-the-shepherds-group-zumbo-gaetano-giulio/)
